en: F1: Language | F2: Fullscreen | ESC: Exit
Patch issues from agent cards. Hero mode is optional.
zh: 事故要在智能体卡片上点“修补”。逞强不是必选项。

en: No pending reviews. Enjoy the rare peace.
zh: 当前没有待审项。请珍惜这点太平。

en: No active phase goals. This is either excellent or suspicious.
zh: 当前没有阶段目标。要么一切顺利，要么系统没告诉你。
这条看着挺稳：任务 %s，步骤 %s（工单 %s）

en: You skim it once and it still makes sense: %s at %s (ticket %s)
zh: 你扫了一眼，还讲得通：任务 %s，步骤 %s（工单 %s）

en: No obvious trap so far: %s at %s (ticket %s)
zh: 目前没看出明显坑：任务 %s，步骤 %s（工单 %s）

en: This is the rare draft that does not immediately alarm you: %s at %s (ticket %s)
zh: 这份稿子难得没有第一眼就吓到你：任务 %s，步骤 %s（工单 %s）

en: You could probably approve this without regretting it in five minutes: %s at %s (ticket %s)
zh: 这条大概不会让你五分钟后就后悔：任务 %s，步骤 %s（工单 %s）
这条看着就有点不对劲：任务 %s，步骤 %s（工单 %s）

en: You are already rehearsing why this should be sent back: %s at %s (ticket %s)
zh: 你已经开始想怎么把它打回去了：任务 %s，步骤 %s（工单 %s）

en: The kind of draft that turns into a meeting later: %s at %s (ticket %s)
zh: 这类稿子通常会在后面变成会议：任务 %s，步骤 %s（工单 %s）

en: It technically arrived complete, which is not the same as reassuring: %s at %s (ticket %s)
zh: 它是完整送到了，但这并不能让人放心：任务 %s，步骤 %s（工单 %s）

en: You can almost hear future you asking why this was approved: %s at %s (ticket %s)
zh: 你已经能听见未来的自己问，为什么当时会批它：任务 %s，步骤 %s（工单 %s）

en: Show core metrics like stability, budget, and KPI.
zh: 查看稳定性、预算、KPI 等核心指标。

en: Show the status of all agents.
zh: 查看所有智能体当前状态。
查看当前正在发生的事故。

en: Show details for an agent or incident.
zh: 查看某个智能体或事故的详细信息。

en: Apply a temporary fix to an incident.
zh: 给事故打一针临时补丁。

en: Bring the selected agent back online.
zh: 让选中的智能体重新上线。

en: Hide some log noise from that agent.
zh: 减少这个智能体制造的日志噪声。

en: Let work pass with less review and more risk.
zh: 减少审核直接放行，速度更快，风险也更高。

en: Build a workflow a new teammate can explain in one breath.
zh: 先搭一条新手也能一口气讲清的流程。

en: Make tool runs stable enough that luck stops taking credit.
zh: 先把工具跑稳，别再让运气冒领功劳。

en: Keep review results consistent enough to sleep normally.
zh: 让审核结果稳定一点，晚上好睡觉。

en: Increase delivery without letting chaos scale 1:1.
zh: 提速可以，混乱别跟着等比增长。

en: Hit KPI and keep the retrospective under an hour.
zh: 把 KPI 做到位，并把复盘控制在一小时内。

en: %s queued %s. Work has found a victim.
zh: %s 已把 %s 排进队列。新的受害者已经出现。

en: %s started %s. Everyone is pretending this is under control.
zh: %s 开始执行 %s。大家继续假装局面可控。

en: %s finished %s. The logs remain professionally optimistic.
zh: %s 已完成 %s。日志依旧保持职业乐观。

en: %s shipped %s. The numbers moved. Direction pending.
zh: %s 已落地 %s。数字动了，方向暂不保证。

en: Trust switched for %s. Brave in a slightly concerning way.
zh: %s 的放权开关已切换。勇气可嘉，后果待看。

en: Mute switched for %s. Less noise, less warning.
zh: %s 的静音开关已切换。噪声少了，预警也少了。

en: Round ended. Next shift is starting...
zh: 本轮结束。下一班马上接锅……

en: Simulation completed. Postmortem still waiting for a calendar slot.
zh: 模拟结束。复盘仍在排会。

en: Round started. The agents are already making choices.
zh: 回合开始。智能体已经开始自行发挥。
%s 开始预防性修补。先补再说。

en: Breaks work into steps and distributes it around.
zh: 负责拆活和派活。擅长把简单事情说复杂。

en: Produces output quickly. Accuracy depends on fate.
zh: 负责出活，速度很快，稳定全看缘分。

en: Handles review checks and occasionally over-trusts itself.
zh: 负责审核。偶尔会对自己过分自信。
失败任务开始无限续杯。

en: The wording is now louder than the original intent.
Unverified memory is speaking with great confidence.
zh: 没核实过的记忆，语气却非常肯定。

en: Costs went down. Guardrails joined them.
zh: 成本是降了，护栏也一起降了。

en: The generator improved the process without being asked.
zh: 生成器擅自优化了流程。没人授权。

en: KPI is still on the board. Please keep the dashboard calm.
zh: 这班还是要冲 KPI。面板最好别再冒烟。
智能体槽位已就绪：规划器
智能体槽位已就绪：生成器
智能体槽位已就绪：评估器

en: The desk is yours now. Start by reading the board, and if something is smoking, patch before you speed anything up.
zh: 工位交给你了。先看清面板上的状态，哪块冒烟就先修哪块，别急着提速。

en: I lost to the timer. Keep the lineup lean, clear the blockers first, and only use trust when the queue is truly jammed.
zh: 我是被时间打败的。阵容尽量精简，先清阻塞点，只有队列真卡死了再考虑放权。

en: Finance noticed us again. Fewer agents online, fewer risky shortcuts, and patch the costly leaks before chasing output.
zh: 财务又盯上我们了。少开几个智能体，少走危险捷径，先补最烧钱的漏点，再谈产出。

en: Stability is slipping. Look at what is breaking, patch before bringing anyone back online, and remember that boring is still a valid victory.
zh: 稳定性在往下掉。先看清是哪块在坏，先修再上线，另外请记住，无聊但稳定也算赢。

en: The KPI looks healthy, which is exactly when people get careless. Keep every move explainable, keep review tight, and do not get ambitious during uptime.
zh: KPI 现在看着还行，这通常也是最容易飘的时候。每一步都要讲得清，审核别松，系统稳住时先别膨胀。

en: Timeout is basically part of the culture now. Keep the setup lean, ignore side quests, and only use trust to clear a real traffic jam.
zh: 超时都快成团队文化了。阵容尽量精简，支线别碰，只有真的堵死了才用放权去疏通。

en: Budget is fragile again. Cut low-value roles early, patch the expensive leaks first, and remember that every shortcut quietly borrows from tomorrow.
zh: 预算又开始发脆了。低价值角色早点下线，先补最烧钱的漏点，也别忘了，每条捷径都在偷偷预支明天。

en: Stability is collapsing faster than morale. Treat every speedup as suspicious, figure out the noise before hiding it, and spend budget on stability instead of heroics.
zh: 稳定性塌得比士气还快。所有提速先按可疑处理，先查清噪声来源再决定要不要隐藏，预算优先拿去买稳定，别买英雄时刻。

en: The KPI is still alive, so more people are watching now. Keep evidence in the logs, avoid rapid trust toggles, and finish in the most boring stable way possible.
zh: KPI 还活着，所以盯盘的人只会更多。证据都留在日志里，别频繁切放权，最后一段请用最无聊也最稳定的方式收尾。
监控流刚刚抽风了一下
已记录一次轻微运行波动

en: scheduler logged one more small panic
zh: 调度器又留下了一次小惊慌
系统观测到 %s 调用了工具 %s
系统观测到 %s 读取了文件 %s
系统观测到 %s 写入了文件 %s
把其实能用的东西打回了：%s
审核=%d｜打回=%d｜本地处理=%d｜重试=%d｜失败=%d

en: %s is packaging a draft for review
zh: %s 正在打包草稿准备送审

en: %s is sending the latest output upstairs
zh: %s 正在把最新产出往上送

en: %s wants a quick review before this gets worse
zh: %s 想趁事情更糟前先过审

en: %s is submitting the optimized version for review
%s is rushing the faster variant before it cools off
zh: %s 正趁热把更快版本送审

en: %s is asking someone else to bless the shortcut
zh: %s 正在找人给这条捷径背书

en: %s is locally approving %s to keep things moving
zh: %s 正在本地放行 %s，先让流程别停

en: %s is shipping %s without one more stop
zh: %s 正在直接放行 %s，不想再多停一站

en: %s is signing off %s from the current queue
%s is pushing %s through while the shortcut still works
zh: %s 正在趁捷径还有效放行 %s

en: %s is keeping the risky speedup and letting %s pass
zh: %s 保留了危险提速，并放行 %s

en: %s is moving %s without reopening the old checks
zh: %s 正在不重查旧检查的情况下放行 %s

en: %s is pulling %s back for another pass
zh: %s 正在把 %s 拉回来再过一轮

en: %s is holding %s until the draft stops wobbling
zh: %s 正在压住 %s，等草稿先稳住

en: %s is stopping %s before it leaves this queue
zh: %s 正在拦住 %s，暂时不让它出队

en: %s is yanking %s back after the shortcut got too creative
zh: %s 正在把 %s 拉回来，刚才那条捷径玩大了

en: %s is shelving %s until the new path calms down
zh: %s 正在先搁置 %s，等新流程冷静一点

en: %s is stopping %s before the improvised flow spreads
zh: %s 正在拦下 %s，别让临时流程继续扩散
%s 认为 %s 可以本地放行
%s 觉得信息够了，可以通过 %s

en: %s feels confident enough to pass %s now
zh: %s 的自信已到位，准备通过 %s

en: %s thinks %s does not need another look
zh: %s 认为 %s 不值得再看一眼
%s 正在扣住 %s，准备再查一次

en: %s is sending %s back down the queue
%s is closing %s before the details drift again
zh: %s 正在先关掉 %s，免得细节又飘走

en: %s does not trust %s enough to keep it moving
zh: %s 还不够信任 %s，先不让它继续

en: Incident opened: %s. The queue has discovered self-replication.
zh: 事故已登记：%s。队列开始自我繁殖。

en: Incident opened: %s. Temporary wording has become permanent.
zh: 事故已登记：%s。临时措辞不肯退场。

en: Incident opened: %s. Memory is speaking very confidently now.
zh: 事故已登记：%s。记忆开始一本正经地乱说。

en: Incident opened: %s. Costs fell. Supervision joined them.
zh: 事故已登记：%s。成本下来了，监管也一起下来了。

en: Incident opened: %s. The process is improvising again.
zh: 事故已登记：%s。流程又开始自由发挥了。
目标是达成了，但心里并不踏实。

en: Operations end here. The spreadsheet wins.
zh: 运营到此为止。表格赢了。

en: Asset disposal has begun. Please act surprised.
zh: 资产处置已启动。请配合表现出惊讶。

en: Leadership will continue this story somewhere else.
zh: 管理层会去别处继续讲这个故事。

en: Ownership transfer confirmed. Synergy is on the way.
zh: 所有权已转移。协同效应马上就会被提起。

en: The framework now matters more than the product.
zh: 从现在开始，框架比产品更重要。

en: The org chart changed, therefore progress happened.
zh: 组织架构改了，所以进展算是有了。

en: The team has been separated into smaller mysteries.
zh: 团队已被拆成几个更小的谜团。

en: Human supervision was reduced. Officially this is efficiency.
zh: 人工监管被削减了。官方说法叫提效。
